greece_impact.pt: a grécia antiga teve grande impacto no mundo

greece_impact.pt: suas ideias ainda vivem hoje
greece_impact.en: its ideas still live in our world today

greece_impact.en: democracy was born in ancient greece

greece_impact.pt: esse modelo mudou a política global
greece_impact.en: this model changed global politics forever

greece_impact.en: philosophers tried to understand life deeply

greece_impact.pt: eles pensaram sobre verdade e razão
greece_impact.en: they thought about truth and reason

greece_impact.pt: suas ideias influenciam até hoje
greece_impact.en: their ideas still influence us today

greece_impact.pt: o pensamento crítico ganhou força
greece_impact.en: critical thinking became very strong there

greece_impact.pt: a ciência começou a crescer ali
greece_impact.en: science started to grow in that region

greece_impact.pt: matemática e lógica evoluíram muito
greece_impact.en: math and logic developed a great deal

greece_impact.pt: o conhecimento virou poder real
greece_impact.en: knowledge became a form of real power

greece_impact.pt: o mundo começou a observar e aprender
greece_impact.en: the world began to observe and learn more

greece_impact.pt: arte e cultura ganharam novos níveis
greece_impact.en: art and culture reached new high levels

greece_impact.pt: teatro e histórias moldaram a mente
greece_impact.en: theater and stories shaped human thinking

greece_impact.pt: beleza e forma tinham grande valor
greece_impact.en: beauty and form had great value there

greece_impact.pt: o corpo e a mente eram importantes
greece_impact.en: body and mind were both very important

greece_impact.pt: hoje vemos a grécia em muitos lugares
greece_impact.en: today we see greece in many places

greece_impact.en: its ideas live in laws and education systems

greece_impact.pt: seu impacto ainda guia o mundo
greece_impact.en: its influence still guides the modern world

greece_impact.pt: a grécia ajudou a criar nossa base
greece_impact.en: greece helped build the base of our world today
